violations.text: Food items prepared in establishment were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door refrigerator in the kitchen have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food Contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off, emptied, and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the basement storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
Food prep tables located in the prep kitchen were observed not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the dough preparation area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
The floor tiles in the prep kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

Foods observed in the prep unit with containers stacked on top of or with other foods. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

Whole cooked onions wrapped in aluminum foil, which were prepared in advance, were not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per PIC whole cooked onions wrapped in aluminum foil were left on the counter overnight in a containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
Utensils (rice scoop) were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

The large mixing bowl was not in good repair, with dents and welded parts that are not smooth and easily cleanable. Mixing bowl must be removed from the premises. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Open employees' beverage containers were observed stored in food preparation areas. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
The hand-washing sink in the employee toilet room was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
Food observed stored uncovered and unprotected in refrigerators. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Tofu was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Working containers of numerous ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
Utensil (Rice paddle) observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of an unclean plastic cooler) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
Single service items are being reused for food preparation and storage. Single service items shall not be reused. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

Numerous wood salad bowls and utensils observed not in good repair, cracked with pieces missing.Large mixing bowl is in poor repair, with dents and welded parts that are n not smooth and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
Drain plugs are lacking for the 3 bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of kitchen shelves, all refrigerators, freezers, ingredient storage bins, mixer, dough machine, counter beneath burners, etc. have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023

The floors and walls throughout the facility (including basement storage area) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
The light bulbs in several ceiling light panels were nonfunctional during inspection.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in areas of the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023
The ceiling is in poor repair, with warped and soiled tiles above food prep area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in several areas of the kitchens. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/03/2023
